bead.title: Delete session-log formatting and file-tail rendering
bead.description:
PROBLEM
DDx still tails and renders Fizeau/agent session-log files into human transcript lines. That duplicates Fizeau-owned session rendering and keeps DDx coupled to inner session-log schemas.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go defines FormatSessionLogLines and related inner-log formatting logic.
- cli/internal/agent/session_log_tailer.go tails agent session logs for display.
- cli/internal/server/workers.go:1655-1704 reads agent-*.jsonl files and calls agent.FormatSessionLogLines for active worker output.

PROPOSED FIX
Remove DDx production code that parses Fizeau session-log JSONL or tails those files for live rendering. Worker/server surfaces should use canonical Fizeau ServiceEvents, Fizeau-rendered progress.message fields, and artifact links/pointers without interpreting session-log schemas.

NON-SCOPE
- DDx-owned worker lifecycle progress events.
- Historical artifact retention.
- Fizeau session rendering implementation.
bead.acceptance:
1. FormatSessionLogLines, TailSessionLogs, and readActiveSessionLog are removed from production code; rg -n 'FormatSessionLogLines|TailSessionLogs|readActiveSessionLog' cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server has no production hits.
2. Worker/server progress surfaces no longer parse Fizeau session-log JSONL.
3. DDx still exposes links or artifact pointers to Fizeau session logs where needed, without rendering those logs itself.
4. Tests that only asserted DDx-owned session-log formatting are deleted or rewritten to assert canonical Fizeau ServiceEvent consumption.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent ./internal/server -run 'Test.*Session|Test.*Worker|Test.*Progress|Test.*Artifact' -count=1 passes.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

governing.title: Feature: DDx Agent Service (consumer of ddx-agent contract)
